overview.description: The Myriad Dynamic Asset Allocation ETF (MDAA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund actively manages a portfolio of equity, fixed-income, and currencies worldwide. Security selection combines top-down sector, country, and thematic research with bottom-up fundamentals and leverage MDAA was launched on Oct 3, 2025 and is issued by Myriad Capital.
